title: Rebel Galaxy
notes: it just won't run

title: Rebel Galaxy
notes: crashes when main menu loads in Direct3D 11/OpenGL mode. Crashes in Direct3D 9 mode when game starts

title: Rebel Galaxy
notes: Works in Direct3D 9/OpenGL mode with disabled dynamic lights, but random crashes when starting the game(when main menu loads)

title: Rebel Galaxy
notes: Add "PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%" without brackets to launch options. Game will start settings menu. Choose DirectX 11 and do NOT choose Borderless Window. Game will start Main Menu without issue. Try to start new Game - This fails in 1 out of 10 trys. Everything else seems to run fine!

title: Rebel Galaxy
notes: Only issue appears to be occasional sound issues (crackling, stuttering)

Works in 'Windowed' and 'Windowed Fullscreen' but not in 'Fullscreen' mode.  Direct3D 11 renderer works perfectly, but OpenGL does not work at all.  Game runs perfectly when I set to Direct3D 11 and Windowed Fullscreen.
title: Rebel Galaxy

notes: Weirdly long load times that feel "hung"
title: Rebel Galaxy

gpu: X.Org AMD Radeon (TM) R9 380 Series (TONGA, DRM 3.26.0, 4.18.6-1-MANJARO, LLVM 6.0.1)
notes:
Played entire campaign (30+ hours) start to finish with wireless xbox controller (knockoff).
Experience is identical as on windows
title: Rebel Galaxy

notes: Use Direct3D 11 renderer on the config dialog box that appears at the start. Works perfectly afterwards. OpenGL causes crash.
title: Rebel Galaxy

notes:
Launcher crashes instantly with "ERROR: ld.so: object '~/.local/share/Steam/ubuntu12_32/gameoverlayrenderer.so' from LD_PRELOAD cannot be preloaded (wrong ELF class: ELFCLASS32): ignored."

Workaround: flip RebelGalaxySteam.exe and SteamLauncher.exe. 
You can also edit game config: ~/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/290300/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/My Games/Double Damage Games/RebelGalaxy/local_settings.txt

It runs perfectly with 
DX11:0
OPENGL:1
FULLSCREEN:1
WINDOW_WIDTH:1920
WINDOW_HEIGHT:1080
RES_WIDTH:1920
RES_HEIGHT:1080
title: Rebel Galaxy

notes: runs perfectly playable in openGL mode, but crashes if the shadow quality is set  to high or better
title: Rebel Galaxy

notes: Steam fails to install game's vcredist with message "Failed to find local per-machine appdata directory" in "pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/Temp" and fails to start game launcher as result. Fix: manually create "pfx/drive_c/ProgramData" folder. After it game works perfectly
title: Rebel Galaxy

notes: Using Direct3D 11 as renderer  (selected in the game set up dialogue) this game runs flawlessly.
title: Rebel Galaxy

notes: Runs perfect with OpenGL with Shadow settings on Ultra and Effects on High.
title: Rebel Galaxy

notes:
Runs on OpenGL perfectly from the first time launch, but the mouse cursor placement doesn't quite precisely placed, for example: when selecting a menu, you have to move your cursor below the intended menu before clicking it.

I decided to use D3D11 by changing its Launch Options to "PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%" to make it work (it won't run in D3D11 by default).
title: Rebel Galaxy

notes: Runs on OpenGL perfectly from the first time launch, but the mouse cursor placement doesn't quite precisely placed, for example: when selecting a menu, you have to move your cursor below the intended menu before clicking it. I decided to use D3D11 by changing its Launch Options to "PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%" to make it work (it won't run in Vulkan's D3D11).
title: Rebel Galaxy

notes: Change graphics API from DX to OpenGL before launch within the games own setup-launcher.
